name: PulseFabric Monitor
updateContentCommand: npm install -g @angular/cli && cd frontend && npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit && cd ../backend && npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit || true
postStartCommand: cd /workspaces/Zero-friction && git pull origin main && cd frontend && npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit && cd ../backend && npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit || true
